criteria.criterion: Focused tests identify and reproduce every live-store writer responsible for T-1 and rec-0000 sidecars.
Synthetic plan-review and completion-verifier tests use explicit isolated stores or mocked event writers and do not mutate the checkout tracker.
The full default suite leaves the checkout tracker HEAD and directory set unchanged.
Production plan-review/completion sidecar emission remains covered and unchanged.
Strict relation snapshots still reject genuine reducer corruption; no fail-open skip is added.

citation.description: Ticket comment: 'under rebar._store.lock.write_lock at expected pre-cleanup tickets HEAD ef632f720c46d6754d6874252ac0a90bc503e226, moved exact namespaces 3601-11b8-430a-4639, 6c56-d5e4-2443-4cf8, 7b3a-26ca-c6ae-47e1, T-1, and rec-0000 to recoverable quarantine ... SHA256.json records every file hash. Committed 32 tracked synthetic sidecar deletions on tickets as 26fd3b26b567a2f18a23046ed19387adca4dab1e and pushed origin/tickets; empty UUID dirs were also removed. Post-cleanup tracker is clean and all five namespaces are absent.'

criteria.criterion: [operator-attested] Empty synthetic directories and tracked T-1/rec-0000 events are removed from the live tree through recoverable, history-preserving cleanup.

citation.description: Ticket comment (2026-07-21 21:58 PDT): 'I ran rebar review-plan 75de-02b0-d454-410b --ref HEAD --output json after cleanup at live tickets tracker HEAD d3333e9b470620e072dfe4922d44fde407f412f1 and merged code HEAD d98a2ce731e496bc880718a436aeb5f60423ba55. Observed outcome: verdict PASS ... The command reached the plan-review gate and reused the valid signed attestation (idempotent_skip=true, llm_ran=false); it did not return reducer-error.'

criteria.criterion: [operator-attested] review-plan 75de reaches the LLM gate after cleanup instead of returning reducer-error.
